460 WORD_RPTTN_1ST_ATMPT_DSCHRG_CD WORD_RPTTN_1ST_ATMPT_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Repetition of Three Words (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to repeat three words just spoken to them. 3 = Three 
2 = Two 
1 = One 
0 = None 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
